definition.name: jordan-product
definition.definition: def-jordan-product (definitions/def-jordan-product.md). For elements a,b of an associative algebra the (ambient) Jordan product is aob=(1/2)(ab+ba); for a,b self-adjoint aob is self-adjoint. In this lemma the eps-JB product o on B_sa is the SYMMETRIZED eps-C* product: for X,Y in B_sa, XoY=(1/2)(X*Y+Y*X) where X*Y=Ftilde(XY) is the Choi-Effros product. This is commutative by construction; we write X^{o2}:=XoX. (Distinct from the ambient (1/2)(XY+YX); note XoX=(1/2)(X*X+X*X)=X*X.)
